resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A derived MCM6/LCT rs4988235 CT call is available for lactase-persistence context. This is not a diagnosis, symptom explanation, diet recommendation, supplement recommendation, dosing result, or model-derived health result.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: This marker can provide lactose-related context, but symptoms, diet history, labs, environment, medications, and professional review matter for nutrition decisions.

resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The local output can describe supplied marker context and unavailable sections, but it must not create a supplement plan, set doses, interpret labs, diagnose deficiencies, or recommend treatment without validated evidence and professional review.
Extracted from page 3 of the public GenoPalate Vitamin & Supplement sample PDF; this is observed sample output structure, not a local calorie target.

supplementContext: Use this report as educational vitamin and supplement genetics context, not as a supplement plan.
Treat GenoPalate sample nutrient targets, formula tables, and supplement facts as observed sample-report structure unless validated local evidence supports equivalent sections.
Discuss diet history, symptoms, lab testing, medications, and supplement questions with qualified professionals.
Do not start, stop, order, or dose supplements based on genotype alone.

plainEnglishLimits: Nutrition and supplement needs depend on diet, symptoms, medications, labs, medical history, environment, and professional review, not genotype alone.
Public sample rows show observed report format and source binding; they are not local personal findings unless the local run supplies equivalent validated evidence.
The local fixture does not include blood vitamin levels, clinical deficiency diagnosis, diet history, medication review, or a calibrated supplement model.

missingInputs: Marketplace detail-page fields beyond the public sample PDF have not been extracted.
No calibrated vitamin, supplement, dosing, micronutrient, symptom, diet-history, lab, medication, or ancestry applicability model is supplied with this fixture.
No local vitamin A, B6, D, E, selenium, zinc, protein, fiber, or calorie target model is supplied.

No diet history, activity history, symptoms, food preferences, medications, lab evidence, child-specific context, ancestry applicability, or clinician/dietitian assessment is represented in this fixture.
uncertainty: Nutrition, supplement response, glucose, weight, symptoms, and wellness outcomes depend on genetics plus non-genetic context and professional review.
Individual sample-report markers and formula rows should not be treated as deterministic local dosing or health predictions.
Public sample rows are examples from a sample report and may not represent the local user.
limitations: This validation result uses derived evidence only; raw genome data is not included.

The report is educational and does not diagnose vitamin or nutrient deficiency, recommend supplements, prescribe dosing, create diet plans, interpret labs, order formulas, or provide treatment guidance.
The GenoPalate public sample PDF is source-bound, but authenticated marketplace detail-page parity remains pending.
